title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Unisys India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Unisys India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Unisys India Holdings Services in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
